# Container Layouts

> Layout containers for UI arrangement

**Category:** Ui · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** ui · godot

## What this does

Layout containers for UI arrangement

Specifies 5 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## What must be true

- **implementation:** Feature implemented in C++ engine core
- **platform_agnostic:** Works across desktop, web, mobile platforms

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **Box Container** — when Horizontal/vertical stacking is requested, then Horizontal/vertical stacking completed.
- **Grid Container** — when Tabular layout is requested, then Tabular layout completed.
- **Tab Container** — when Tabbed interface is requested, then Tabbed interface completed.
- **Margin Container** — when Add spacing around child is requested, then Add spacing around child completed.
- **Scroll Container** — when Scrollable content area is requested, then Scrollable content area completed.
